# ⚠️ WORKFLOWS TEMPORARILY DISABLED

To avoid notification spam, all workflows are disabled until further notice.

## Status

| Workflow | Status | Reason |
|----------|--------|--------|
| ci-cd.yml |  禁用 | 每次 push 都触发，造成邮件骚扰 |
| auto-response.yml |  禁用 | 自动回复不需要 |

## When to Re-enable

- When project is stable
- When notification policy is configured
- When user explicitly requests

## Manual Testing

You can still run workflows manually:
1. Go to Actions tab
2. Select workflow
3. Click "Run workflow"

---
